content: buildSystemPrompt() now injects a dynamic Context block (IST date + time via Intl.DateTimeFormat) between the rules list and Research Results. No imports needed — expressions evaluate inline in the template literal at call time.

buildSystemPrompt now accepts optional timezone param (string|undefined); falls back to UTC when absent. Timezone injected by client via DefaultChatTransport body.timezone = Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone, then destructured in route.ts.
